title: astragalus raddei
intro: Astragalus raddei, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Astragalus raddei include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving overall well-being. Astragalus raddei can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
